title: Aviotic Idiocy
description:
A modpack about idiotic aviation.

*Does not focus on aviation
body:
### About
A modpack I made. _Contains a bit of aviation_

This modpack started as a personal modpack, but i decided to release it to the public. I will hopefully continue working on this modpack... until my interest in Minecraft dies out for six months.

### Quests
Not much yet... but they're probably coming.

You will have to install FTB Quests 1.21.1, FTB Library 1.21.1 and FTB Teams 1.21.1:

curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric  
curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric  
curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric

And place them in the modepacks /mods folder.
